name: The Home Team with Britt & Annie
original_name: The Home Team with Britt & Annie
overview: Best friends and rookie renovators Annie Hawkins and Brittany Baker impressed Salt Lake City with their creative designs. With numerous clients knocking on their door, they’re going from first-time to full-time with their own renovation start-up business.

trailers.title: The Home Team with Britt & Annie - Official Trailer | Coming Soon | Magnolia Network
